onboarding.welcome: 👋 Welcome to MamaBot! I'll help you track your pregnancy.
onboarding.ask_lmp: 📅 Enter the first day of your last menstrual period in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., 2026-01-15):
onboarding.invalid_lmp: ❌ Invalid date format. Please enter the date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
onboarding.already_registered: 👋 You are already registered! Use the menu to navigate.
onboarding.ask_edd: 📅 Enter the estimated due date in DD.MM.YYYY format:
onboarding.edd_before_lmp: ❌ Due date cannot be before the last menstrual period ({{lmp}}). Please enter a valid date.
onboarding.edd_confirmed: ✅ EDD {{edd}} saved! You've successfully completed setup.
onboarding.edd_invalid: ❌ Invalid date. Please enter a valid due date in DD.MM.YYYY format.
onboarding.edd_invalid_format: ❌ Invalid date format. Please enter the date in DD.MM.YYYY format.
onboarding.edd_prompt: 📅 Enter the estimated due date in DD.MM.YYYY format:
onboarding.edd_too_far: ❌ Due date is too far from the last menstrual period (maximum 300 days). Please enter a valid date.
onboarding.edd_too_late: ❌ Due date is too far from the last menstrual period (maximum 300 days). Please enter a valid date.
